title: millettia grandis
intro: Milletia grandis, also known as the African ebony or black acacia, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a large tree native to tropical Africa, valued for its dark wood, which is used in furniture making and other wood products. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Milletia grandis include decoctions and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall health and well-being.
